# Winzard documentation feature matrix

| Capability | Contract version 1 |
| --- | --- |
| Project vault scaffold | Supported |
| Stable project-prefixed IDs | Supported |
| Schema, link, lifecycle and secret checks | Supported |
| Deterministic indexes, status reports and context packages | Supported |
| AGENTS/Claude/Gemini/Copilot adapters | Supported |
| Consumer contract sync | Supported |
| Automated human approval enforcement | External repository control required |
| Runtime AI provider or agent integration | Separate capability; not included |
